feedback:
Structural gate (design/review-template.md G1-G8) — packaging fidelity, not science; the W/L values were already gated upstream in `measurement`.

G1 entry resolves — artifacts/review-site/index.html present, non-empty
G2 self-contained — every href/src is relative and resolves inside the folder
G3 data globals — data/manifest.js and data/values.js each assign a non-empty window.* global
G4 JS statically valid — every element id assets/app.js references exists in index.html
G5 no local fetch — no fetch()/XMLHttpRequest of a relative or .json path
G6 origins within allowlist — no external <script>/<link> origins (cdn_allowlist: [])
G7 verdict surface — #export-btn emits a review-verdict/1 payload
G8 provenance fidelity — data/manifest.js sample_id and produced_from.measurement hash match this run

All checks pass.
